_readme: Data-query wrapper. Goes in the `operations` field of the chart's data_query (the auto-created sibling Insights Query v3 doc). Replace <SOURCE_QUERY_NAME> with the source query's name (e.g. 'dodbej7124') and <WORKBOOK_ID> with the workbook id integer (NOT a string).
_save_hint: After save, the data_query's `linked_queries` field will auto-populate with ["<SOURCE_QUERY_NAME>"] — that's how you confirm the source op parsed correctly.
